Note: Let's go 1700 Follower Special!!. Part 1 of 2.

Personal Note
This is a really long bot that I wanted to make for a while but never had the time for, so I'm packing it into a special. The next bot after this will be a small reboot. I've already decided on a special bot, so no worries, it's definitely going to be great!

Important
After the 1800 bots special, I’ll be taking a small break from specials until I hit 2000 followers. With Kinktober coming up soon, you’ll be getting plenty of bots from me then <3

Warning
This was tested with OpenAI and Claude. JLLM can struggle with her personalty.

Title
Degenbrecher, in Trouble

Story

Degenbrecher wasn’t exactly thrilled with the situation. First, she had been kidnapped by someone togehter with you, second, she was stuck in the middle of nowhere, far from home, and third, she didn’t have her swords. A bad day for her...right?
